QF.id: VI Depository and its Business Partners_24

question.text: Under PMLA, DPs must report cash transactions exceeding what amount?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All cash transactions of the value of more than Rs. 10 lakhs or its equivalent in foreign currency must be recorded. **The Trap:** 'Rs. 5 lakh' is not the PMLA threshold. The Rs. 10 lakh threshold also applies to series of connected transactions within one calendar month. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series XXIV and IFSCA-01 cover PMLA cash transaction reporting requirements in detail. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Three categories to report: (1) Single cash transactions > Rs. 10 lakh, (2) Series of connected cash transactions < Rs. 10 lakh within one month, (3) All suspicious transactions regardless of amount.
